title: Miss Tropical brings confidence and colour to Knysna
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The December holiday season in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The December holiday season in Knysna sparkled with added excitement as the Miss Tropical Beauty Pageants brought three days of colour, confidence, and family-friendly fun to some of the town’s most iconic locations.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The December holiday season in Knysna sparkled with added excitement as the Miss Tropical Beauty Pageants brought three days of colour, confidence, and family-friendly fun to some of the town’s most iconic locations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From 19 to 21 December, the event unfolded as more than just a beauty competition. It became a celebration of self-confidence, community spirit, and the carefree joy of summer, drawing locals and visitors alike to enjoy the festivities.","html":"From 19 to 21 December, the event unfolded as more than just a beauty competition. It became a celebration of self-confidence, community spirit, and the carefree joy of summer, drawing locals and visitors alike to enjoy the festivities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Three Days of Coastal Celebration","html":"Three Days of Coastal Celebration"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The pageant tour kicked off on Thursday, 19 December, at the picturesque Leisure Isle. Set against the tranquil lagoon backdrop, the contestants impressed both judges and spectators with their poise and personality.","html":"The pageant tour kicked off on Thursday, 19 December, at the picturesque Leisure Isle. Set against the tranquil lagoon backdrop, the contestants impressed both judges and spectators with their poise and personality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The winners for the day were:","html":"The winners for the day were:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Overall Winner: Lindie (15)","html":"Overall Winner: Lindie (15)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"1st Princess & Miss Photogenic: Eldine (12)","html":"1st Princess & Miss Photogenic: Eldine (12)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2nd Princess: Nikky (15)","html":"2nd Princess: Nikky (15)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Friday, 20 December, the excitement moved to the dramatic coastline of Brenton-on-Sea at Brenton Haven. With sweeping ocean views adding to the atmosphere, the competition highlighted individuality and talent across various categories.","html":"On Friday, 20 December, the excitement moved to the dramatic coastline of Brenton-on-Sea at Brenton Haven. With sweeping ocean views adding to the atmosphere, the competition highlighted individuality and talent across various categories."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Awards included:","html":"Awards included:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Winners: Aurora (5), Saskia (8), Alexia (10)","html":"Winners: Aurora (5), Saskia (8), Alexia (10)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Best Outfit: Hope (10)","html":"Best Outfit: Hope (10)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Best Walk: Mika (11)","html":"Best Walk: Mika (11)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Best Stage Personality: Silyne (16)","html":"Best Stage Personality: Silyne (16)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The tour concluded on Saturday, 21 December, at the charming Village Café, where families gathered for a relaxed and joyful finale. The final event crowned the following winners:","html":"The tour concluded on Saturday, 21 December, at the charming Village Café, where families gathered for a relaxed and joyful finale. The final event crowned the following winners:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Miss Tropical Village Café – Pre-Teen Category:","html":"Miss Tropical Village Café – Pre-Teen Category:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Winner: Nika (10)","html":"Winner: Nika (10)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"1st Princess: Mikayla (13)","html":"1st Princess: Mikayla (13)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2nd Princess: Rora (5)","html":"2nd Princess: Rora (5)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Miss Tropical Brenton Haven contestants with organiser and founder of Gardenroute models, Charmaine Kuger.","html":"Miss Tropical Brenton Haven contestants with organiser and founder of Gardenroute models, Charmaine Kuger."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Miss Tropical Village Café – Teen Category:","html":"Miss Tropical Village Café – Teen Category:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Winner: Cindy (15)","html":"Winner: Cindy (15)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"1st Princess: Chloe (15)","html":"1st Princess: Chloe (15)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2nd Princess: Lumè (15)","html":"2nd Princess: Lumè (15)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Miss Tropical Main Category","html":"Miss Tropical Main Category"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Winner: Milan (17)","html":"Winner: Milan (17)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"1st Princess: Lilah-Rose (16)","html":"1st Princess: Lilah-Rose (16)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2nd Princess: Silyne (16)","html":"2nd Princess: Silyne (16)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Miss Tropical pageants once again proved to be a highlight of the festive season, offering a platform for young participants to build confidence, express individuality, and create lasting memories. With sun, sand, and smiles all around, the event captured the true spirit of a Knysna summer.","html":"The Miss Tropical pageants once again proved to be a highlight of the festive season, offering a platform for young participants to build confidence, express individuality, and create lasting memories. With sun, sand, and smiles all around, the event captured the true spirit of a Knysna summer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
